lines.english: O Lord of the Universe, I am such a sinner!

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨਿ ਪ੍ਰਭਿ ਜੀਉ ਪਿੰਡੁ ਥਾ ਦੀਆ ਤਿਸ ਕੀ ਭਾਉ ਭਗਤਿ ਨਹੀ ਸਾਧੀ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: jin prabh jeeo pindd thaa deea tis kee bhaau bhagat nahee saadhee |1| rahaau |
lines.english: God gave me body and soul, but I have not practiced loving devotional worship to Him. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਰ ਧਨ ਪਰ ਤਨ ਪਰ ਤੀ ਨਿੰਦਾ ਪਰ ਅਪਬਾਦੁ ਨ ਛੂਟੈ ॥
lines.translit: par dhan par tan par tee nindaa par apabaad na chhoottai |
lines.english: Others' wealth, others' bodies, others' wives, others' slander and others' fights - I have not given them up.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਵਾ ਗਵਨੁ ਹੋਤੁ ਹੈ ਫੁਨਿ ਫੁਨਿ ਇਹੁ ਪਰਸੰਗੁ ਨ ਤੂਟੈ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: aavaa gavan hot hai fun fun ihu parasang na toottai |2|
lines.english: For the sake of these, coming and going in reincarnation happens over and over again, and this story never ends. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਹ ਘਰਿ ਕਥਾ ਹੋਤ ਹਰਿ ਸੰਤਨ ਇਕ ਨਿਮਖ ਨ ਕੀਨੑੋ ਮੈ ਫੇਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: jih ghar kathaa hot har santan ik nimakh na keenao mai feraa |
lines.english: That house, in which the Saints speak of the Lord - I have not visited it, even for an instant.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਾਮ ਕ੍ਰੋਧ ਮਾਇਆ ਮਦ ਮਤਸਰ ਏ ਸੰਪੈ ਮੋ ਮਾਹੀ ॥
lines.translit: kaam krodh maaeaa mad matasar e sanpai mo maahee |
lines.english: Sexual desire, anger, the wine of Maya, and envy - these are what I collect within myself.

lines.gurmukhi: ਲੰਪਟ ਚੋਰ ਦੂਤ ਮਤਵਾਰੇ ਤਿਨ ਸੰਗਿ ਸਦਾ ਬਸੇਰਾ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: lanpatt chor doot matavaare tin sang sadaa baseraa |3|
lines.english: Drunkards, thieves, and evil-doers - I constantly dwell with them. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੀਨ ਦਇਆਲ ਕ੍ਰਿਪਾਲ ਦਮੋਦਰ ਭਗਤਿ ਬਛਲ ਭੈ ਹਾਰੀ ॥
lines.translit: deen deaal kripaal damodar bhagat bachhal bhai haaree |
lines.english: He is merciful to the meek, compassionate and benevolent, the Lover of His devotees, the Destroyer of fear.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦਇਆ ਧਰਮੁ ਅਰੁ ਗੁਰ ਕੀ ਸੇਵਾ ਏ ਸੁਪਨੰਤਰਿ ਨਾਹੀ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: deaa dharam ar gur kee sevaa e supanantar naahee |4|
lines.english: Compassion, righteousness, and service to the Guru - these do not visit me, even in my dreams. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਹਤ ਕਬੀਰ ਭੀਰ ਜਨ ਰਾਖਹੁ ਹਰਿ ਸੇਵਾ ਕਰਉ ਤੁਮੑਾਰੀ ॥੫॥੮॥
lines.translit: kehat kabeer bheer jan raakhahu har sevaa krau tumaaree |5|8|
lines.english: Says Kabeer, please protect Your humble servant from disaster; O Lord, I serve only You. ||5||8||
You shall go to heaven, and not return to this earth.
Remembering Him in meditation, the door of liberation is found.
In the home of the Fearless Lord, the celestial trumpets resound.
Practice such meditative remembrance in your mind.
The unstruck sound current will vibrate and resonate forever. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਸਿਮਰਨ ਮੁਕਤਿ ਕਤ ਨਾਹਿ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: bin simaran mukat kat naeh |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Without this meditative remembrance, liberation will never be found. ||1||Pause||
Remembering Him in meditation, you will meet with no obstruction.
Bow in humility within your heart,
You will be liberated, and the great load will be taken away.
God has placed His lamp deep within you, which burns without any oil.
Remember Him in meditation, celebrate and be happy.
and you will not have to be reincarnated over and over again. ||2||
Remembering Him in meditation, you shall obtain salvation.
That lamp makes the world immortal;
it conquers and drives out the poisons of sexual desire and anger. ||3||
By Guru's Grace, you shall cross over. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋ ਸਿਮਰਨੁ ਕਰਿ ਨਹੀ ਰਾਖੁ ਉਤਾਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: so simaran kar nahee raakh utaar |
lines.english: Practice that meditative remembrance, and never let it go.
Wear that meditative remembrance as your necklace.
You shall sleep in your mansion, in blankets of silk.
Remembering Him in meditation, you shall not be obligated to others.
Your soul shall blossom forth in happiness, on this comfortable bed.
So drink in this meditative remembrance, night and day. ||5||
Remembering Him in meditation, your troubles will depart.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਿਮਰਿ ਸਿਮਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਮਨਿ ਗਾਈਐ ॥
lines.translit: simar simar har har man gaaeeai |
lines.english: Meditate, meditate in remembrance on the Lord, Har, Har, and sing His Praises in your mind.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਹ ਸਿਮਰਨਿ ਤੁਝੁ ਪੋਹੈ ਨ ਮਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: jih simaran tujh pohai na maae |
lines.english: Remembering Him in meditation, Maya will not bother you.
This meditative remembrance is obtained from the True Guru. ||6||
Forever and ever, remember Him, day and night,
The Lord's meditative remembrance is obtained by good destiny. ||7||
While awake and asleep, enjoy the essence of this meditative remembrance.
while standing up and sitting down, with every breath and morsel of food.
Make this meditative remembrance of the Lord's Name your Support.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਹਿ ਕਬੀਰ ਜਾ ਕਾ ਨਹੀ ਅੰਤੁ ॥
lines.translit: keh kabeer jaa kaa nahee ant |
lines.english: Says Kabeer, He has no limits;

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਸ ਕੇ ਆਗੇ ਤੰਤੁ ਨ ਮੰਤੁ ॥੮॥੯॥
lines.translit: tis ke aage tant na mant |8|9|
lines.english: no tantras or mantras can be used against Him. ||8||9||
Remembering Him in meditation, you shall not be loaded down.
The Guru, the Liberated One, has put out the fire.

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਮਕਲੀ ਘਰੁ ੨ ਬਾਣੀ ਕਬੀਰ ਜੀ ਕੀ ॥
lines.translit: raamakalee ghar 2 baanee kabeer jee kee |
lines.english: Raamkalee, Second House, The Word Of Kabeer Jee:
One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:
Maya, the Trapper, has sprung her trap.
